item.title: 互联网法院联盟瞄准代理商务堆栈中缺失的争议层
item.summary: A 27-company consortium called Internet Court, spotlighted by builder Ayimjr, has launched a dispute-resolution layer for agent-to-agent commerce built around GenLayer's AI validators — claiming 350,000 daily transactions and sub-$2 dispute costs, though all figures remain self-reported.
